title: AGO Fair Labor Division: File a Workplace Complaint
description: MA Attorney General's Office page on filing a workplace complaint with the Fair Labor Division — minimum wage, unpaid wages, overtime, independent-contractor misclassification, tip violations, earned sick time, meal-break violations, child labor, domestic-violence leave, prevailing wage, and employment discrimination. Complaints may be filed online, anonymously, and without documents in hand; multilingual forms available.

source.publisher: Massachusetts Attorney General's Office — Fair Labor Division

notes: No explicit SOL stated; AGO may issue warnings, civil citations, criminal charges, or a private-right-of-action letter. Fair Labor Hotline: (617) 727-3465, Mon–Fri 10am–4pm. AGO jurisdiction is primarily private-sector + certain public wage claims; DDS/public employees may have overlapping but distinct remedies.
